title: [MTS/IV]ACME Heavy Industries Pack
description: A pack for Immersive Vehicles aimed at developing cutting edge vehicles
body:
Requires latest version of the Immersive Vehicles Mod and the Official Content Pack to function.

Please report any bugs in appropriate page on the discord.

This page will get a nice facelift eventually.

Welcome to ACME Heavy Industries. Here we create more cost effective solutions to your Minecraft military needs. We are divided in to 3 divisions. The main branch, which manufactures base parts required for everything else,  ACME Armories: combat vehicles and weapons, and ACME Civilian: Civilian vehicles.

=======Current Aircraft Included========

===Military===

FJ-10 Mako (F-20 TIgershark)

FJ-12 Lancer (MiG-21 FIshbed)

===CIvilian===

ACME Executive PJ-50 (Cirrus SF-50 Vision Jet)

=======Planned Content=======

See the roadmap linked in the pack discord.
